_about: Cached snapshot of the Notion 'Sections' database property schema (names + types only, no row data). Used for offline reference and drift detection. /sync-sections should flag if the live schema diverges from this snapshot. Types are best-known mappings; a few status-vs-select properties may report differently in the live DB — treat a type mismatch here as drift to confirm, not an error. Note: the 'Mobile Version' property names use a plain hyphen '-', not an em dash — verified against the live database 2026-06-11.
pendingRule: A row is pending when any of the four 'Desired ...' fields is non-empty AND 'Changes Applied' is unchecked.
desiredFields: Desired Text Typography Changes - Mobile Version
